title: Software Update - Tapping on "Software Update"  button on Home Screen opens Software Update tab in Device Settings
scenario: Tapping Software Update on Home Screen navigates to Device Settings Software Update tab showing all device components
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, locate and tap the "Software Update" button.
expected: The Software Update tab within Device Settings opens, displaying all device components (e.g., Headset/Earbuds and Charge Case/Charge Stand if applicable).
